Admin goes quiet before major moves (Syria 2017, Soleimani 2020, Apr 2025 tariffs). Loud preemptive credit-claiming = fragility; silence = imminent action. Inverse: loud partner complaint signals framework fragile and unilateral action on the table.

Admin loudly demands outcomes that occur mechanically (gas prices, nuclear inspection, housing), then claims credit.
